title: ctenopteris leysii
intro: Ctenopteris leysii, also known as the New Zealand fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris leysii include relief from arthritis and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Ctenopteris leysii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
